name: deepwiki-index
description: Index a public GitHub repo's DeepWiki (the page the 'Ask DeepWiki' badge links to) hands-free, and do it autonomously after publishing or updating a repo — no human clicking. Encodes the verified deepwiki.com trigger (api.devin.ai/ada/index_public_repo, reCAPTCHA v2-invisible) and the trusted-browser path: drive the real desktop browser (screen-mcp) or run the bundled Playwright helper with a real Chrome profile so the captcha passes silently, then poll the public status API to completed.
